zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane de Frye於1446年出生在英國英格蘭戴文諾斯 莫爾頓時，她的父親John Frye21歲，母親Mrs John Frye17歲。她於1465年與William Perry II在英國英格蘭戴文梅波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年在英國英格蘭戴文可姆 馬丁享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane de Frye于1446年出生在英国英格兰戴文諾斯 莫爾頓时，她的父亲John Frye21岁，母亲Mrs John Frye17岁。她于1465年与William Perry II在英国英格兰戴文梅波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年在英国英格兰戴文可姆 馬丁享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Frye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Joseph Frye (1711/12–94) was a military officer from Andover, MA, where the family had long been of local prominence. In 1762, he was granted a township in ME, later named Fryeburg after him, and moved his family there. His great-great-grandson William Pierce Frye was born in Lewiston, ME, and served in Congress, first as a member of the House of Representatives and then the Senate from 1871 until his death in 1911.

variants.name: Fry
meanings: English (mainly southern and southwestern): from Middle English frie ‘free’ (Old English frīo, frīg), with reference either to rank or tenurial status (‘free-born’) or to character (‘generous, open-handed’). It is synonymous with Free .
Americanized form of German Frei or Frey , or of the Dutch cognate Vrij.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane de Frye was born in 1446, in North Molton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Frye, was 21 and her mother, Mrs John Frye, was 17. She married William Perry II in 1465, in Membury, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1485, in Combe Martin, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane de Frye est née en 1446, à North Molton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Frye, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mrs John Frye, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé William Perry II en 1465, à Membury, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1485, à Combe Martin, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane de Frye 1446 in North Molton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Frye 21 und ihre Mutter Mrs John Frye 17. Sie hat 1465 in Membury, Devon, England, United Kingdom William Perry II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1485 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Combe Martin, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato William Perry II nel 1465, nel Membury, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Joane de Fryeが1446年にイギリスイギリスデボンノース モルトンで生まれた時，父John Fryeは21歳，母Mrs John Fryeは17歳であった。1465年にイギリスイギリスデボンメンブリーでWilliam Perry IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年にイギリスイギリスデボンコンベ マルティンで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane de Frye(이)가 1446년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 노르스 모턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Frye(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs John Frye(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 버이에서 William Perry II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코브 마틴에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William Perry II em 1465, em Membury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane de Frye родилась в 1446 г. в местности норт молтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Frye было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs John Frye, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Perry II в 1465 г. в местности мембури, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1485 г. в местности комб мартинь, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.

Se casó con William Perry II en 1465, en Membury, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1485, en Combe Martin, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años.
